name: movie-goat-pp-mcp
description: Movie Goat MCP tools for TMDb discovery plus optional OMDb enrichment in ratings, versus, and career commands.

tmdb_api_key.title: TMDb v3 API Key (32-char hex; sent as ?api_key=… query param, not Bearer header)
tmdb_api_key.description: Sets TMDB_API_KEY for the Movie Goat MCP server. Get a credential from https://www.themoviedb.org/settings/api.

omdb_api_key.title: OMDb API Key
omdb_api_key.description: Optional. Sets OMDB_API_KEY for the Movie Goat MCP server to enable IMDb, Rotten Tomatoes, and Metacritic enrichment. Get a credential from http://www.omdbapi.com/apikey.aspx.
